/opt/rocm-7.1.0/lib/llvm/bin/clang++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG --offload-arch=gfx942 --hip-link --rtlib=compiler-rt -unwindlib=libgcc -flto=auto -shared  -o gptoss.cpython-312-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/gptoss_python.dir/src/python/bindings.cpp.o  libgptoss_engine.a libgptoss_model.a libgptoss_comm.a libgptoss_kernels.a /opt/rocm-7.1.0/lib/libamdhip64.so.7.1.70100 /opt/rocm-7.1.0/lib/libhipblas.so.3.1.70100 /opt/rocm/lib/libamdhip64.so.7.1.70100 /opt/rocm/lib/libhipblaslt.so.1.1.70100 /opt/rocm/lib/librccl.so
